summary_en: 1,000,000 shares (5.25% of outstanding) to be acquired for up to ¥500M via open-market purchase on TSE Standard, execution window 1 June – 31 December 2026. Purpose: improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation responsive to changing business environment.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Abalance Corporation announced via board resolution on 25 May 2026 that it will acquire up to 1,000,000 of its own ordinary shares, representing approximately 5.25% of issued shares outstanding, for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥500 million. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Standard market during the period from 1 June 2026 through 31 December 2026. The company stated the purpose is to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changes in the operating environment. The specific method of deployment of acquired shares has not yet been determined and will be decided after comprehensive consideration of future business conditions, financial position, and overall capital policy. The company estimates the acquisition will have negligible impact on consolidated results.
